mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 9.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off behavior that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 9.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real consumer spending (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates robust demand conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate earnings expectations.
failure_condition: The joint growth of RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 20d returns in > 60% of cases, or their correlation drops below 0.4.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production (INDPRO) below its 3-month moving average signals supply-side disruptions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days due to inflationary pressures and reduced corporate output.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO falls below 93.59.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) above 131,028 thousand persons signals a tightening labor market, pushing inflation expectations higher and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 131,028.

mechanism_narrative: A rising CPI (CPIAUCSL) above 224.433 combined with low Fed funds rates indicates stagflation risks, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through increased market volatility.
failure_condition: The combination of CPIAUCSL > 224.433 and FEDFUNDS < 0.1 fails to produce negative 5d returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in GDP (GDPC1) following a contraction signals economic recovery, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate earnings and investor sentiment.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in < 40% of instances where GDPC1 exceeds 13438.8.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below 93.59 combined with rising housing starts (HOUST) indicates mixed supply dynamics, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through sectoral divergence.
failure_condition: The combination of INDPRO < 93.59 and HOUST > 549.0 fails to produce negative 20d returns in > 60% of cases.
